states.name: Alira
states.title: Silk-Veiled Siren
states.description:
―― Beginning mission report.

I've just departed Hymelian territory. Duke Valenne welcomed me to his feast most warmly, and his son even more so. I fortuitously happened by his bedroom in the morning -- just in time to be caught. Your wisdom proved invaluable yet again, master. The flustered lover truly is my most convincing mask.

The rumor mill has already started churning. As you requested, the boy is unharmed, though I can't say the same for his reputation. I expect his betrothed's house to call things off within the month, which is a problem solved for us.

I remain your faithful servant. For the glory of Bergaria.

states.name: Alira
states.title: Silk-Veiled Siren
states.description:
―― Beginning mission report.

I thank you for this assignment, master. Every day I am away from Bergaria, I long to return. To work the Emperor's will in his own domain is my highest honor.

The upstart senator was bold to throw a ball while so publicly defying his regent. I've seen to his punishment. The toxin I slipped into his wine shrivels the body from the inside out. Make no mistake: everyone will know he was poisoned, and everyone will know why.

I remain your faithful servant. For the glory of Bergaria.

states.name: Alira
states.title: Silk-Veiled Siren
states.description:
―― Beginning my report.

I did it, master. The blade slid right between his ribs, just like you said it would. In the end, he didn't even scream. He just looked at me, so scared and confused, like he had no idea who could possibly want him dead.

No idea at all.

The bastard took everything from me, and he never even spared it a second thought.

(The text beyond this is illegible. The paper is wrinkled with age, and the ink is smeared with tear stains.)
